creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
dougb       2011-09-09 19:10:18 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net-mgmt/nagios-check_ports Makefile 
  Added files:
    net-mgmt/nagios-check_ports/files patch-check_ports 
  Log:
  This patch adds the ability to specify the path to the INDEX
  file, as well as the path to portaudit. It also contains a few
  small shell cleanups.
  
  Upstream author no longer uses FreeBSD, so there will not be
  a new release.
  
  PR:             ports/160222
  Submitted by:   me
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4       +1 -0      ports/net-mgmt/nagios-check_ports/Makefile
  1.1       +108 -0    ports/net-mgmt/nagios-check_ports/files/patch-check_ports (new)
